content: Would it be okay to add all the remaining error codes to rust/kernel/error.rs in one swoop?  It seems dumb to add them one at a time, which is what we've been doing.  I wanted to return ENODATA but that's not defined.

If you mean the ones from generic files from which we already include others, yeah, that should be fine. I asked for that back then and @Fiona Behrens added them (https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/pull/455#issuecomment-885709535) but then I think I trimmed them again when we were requested to minimize changes for upstreaming.

It would also be nice to add a newline and a comment to group them from the files they came from.
